mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS RESULT FROM MEMBER WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", EMAIL as "email", NAME as "name", NICKNAME as "nickname", PROFILE_IMAGE as "profileImage" FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", EMAIL as "email", NAME as "name", NICKNAME as "nickname", PROFILE_IMAGE as "profileImage", PASSWORD as "password", ROLE as "role" FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", EMAIL as "email", NAME as "name", NICKNAME as "nickname", PROFILE_IMAGE as "profileImage", PASSWORD as "password", ROLE as "role" FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT EMAIL as "email", NAME as "name", PASSWORD as "password" FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED' AND TO_TIMESTAMP(LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 days'
mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_ID as "tripId", NAME as "name", STATUS as "status" FROM TRIP WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY TO_TIMESTAMP(COALESCE(LATEST_DATE, CREATE_DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT GENERATE_PK('M', 'SEQ_MEMBER')
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, ROLE, SOCIAL_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{member.memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{member.socialType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT t.TRIP_ID AS "tripId", t.NAME AS "name", t.STATUS AS "status", t.START_DATE AS "startDate", t.END_DATE AS "endDate", t.LATEST_DATE AS "latestDate", CASE WHEN t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE' THEN COUNT(DISTINCT ts.TRIP_SCHEDULE_ID) ELSE 0 END AS "scheduleCount", CASE WHEN t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE' THEN COUNT(DISTINCT b.BOOKMARK_ID) ELSE 0 END AS "bookmarkCount", 30 - EXTRACT(DAY FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - TO_TIMESTAMP(t.LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))) AS "remainDate" FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_DAY td ON t.TRIP_ID = td.TRIP_ID LEFT JOIN TRIP_SCHEDULE ts ON td.TRIP_DAY_ID = ts.TRIP_DAY_ID LEFT JOIN BOOKMARK b ON t.TRIP_ID = b.TRIP_ID WHERE t.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE' GROUP BY t.TRIP_ID, t.NAME, t.STATUS, t.START_DATE, t.END_DATE, t.LATEST_DATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRIP WHERE STATUS = 'INACTIVE' AND TO_TIMESTAMP(LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 days'
